name: forgekit
description: Project-level workflow harness for Codex, Claude Code, and adjacent AI coding tools.

interface.shortDescription: Project workflow harness for AI coding tools.
interface.longDescription: ForgeKit provides shared skills, project templates, and read-only checks for project initialization, handover, review, release, and safety gates across Codex and Claude Code.
defaultPrompt: Use ForgeKit to initialize this project.
Use ForgeKit to run a handover review.
Use ForgeKit to check this project before release.
